item.title: Price is now the main ingredient in the office-lunch slop bowl
item.description: Many chains have raised prices to absorb rising costs — which works as long as customer loyalty, or indifference, endures

item.title: Palmer Luckey’s $1bn pitch to reboot 1990s video game consoles
item.description: From AI weapons to Game Boys, defence tech billionaire is in talks to raise funds for new gaming venture ModRetro

item.title: Meteorologists bet on ‘swing’ to warming El Niño weather cycle
item.description: Chance of natural cycle that raises equatorial ocean temperatures put at 59% between August and October

item.title: UK lenders raise mortgage rates amid warnings over inflation and energy prices
item.description: Market mood ‘has completely changed’ following outbreak of Middle East war

item.title: Can Crispin Odey convince a judge he was the victim of a regulatory crusade?
item.description: Financier is appealing UK watchdog’s decision to ban and fine him in the wake of sexual misconduct allegations

item.title: Allowing 401ks to invest in private markets is a bad move at a bad time
item.description: The move might help asset managers but hurt savers and the economy more broadly

item.description: A protracted conflict in the Middle East would dent expectations that global coal consumption will start to fall

item.description: Effective marginal tax rates discourage higher earners from pursuing career advancementTax

item.description: Millions of people are already turning to chatbots such as ChatGPT to plan their retirement

item.description: Swire defends management model that critics argue is outdated and inefficient

item.description: Alphabet boss gets bumper package of stock options tied to the share price and growth of Waymo in the next three years

item.description: Hizbollah said it had engaged Israeli forces in the Bekaa Valley

item.description: New roles from Maple Leaf Sports & Entertainment offset reductions in other parts of the company

item.title: US draws up strict new AI guidelines amid Anthropic clash
item.description: Draft rules mandate civilian government contracts make models available for ‘any lawful’ use

item.title: Oracle and OpenAI scrap deal to expand flagship Texas data centre
item.description: Meta in talks to take up additional computing capacity that the ChatGPT maker will not take up

item.description: Goldman Sachs warns crude will soar past 2008 peak if action is not taken to reopen Strait of Hormuz

item.description: Governments say deal will bring ‘one project, one review’ approach to addressing impact of projects

item.description: Chambers of commerce urge Ottawa to ban children under 16 from using AI tools and social media

item.description: Non-profit has already raised $1-million for project helping young adults and families find mental-health services they need

item.title: South Bow approaches Saskatchewan landowners in bid to revive Keystone XL pipeline
item.description: Move follows months of speculation around the project, which was cancelled in 2021

item.title: The Iran war is propelling Germany into another energy crisis
item.description: Situation is made worse by Berlin’s energy policy for the past 25 years, which has been illogical to the point of madness

item.description: Penalty is the largest ever imposed against a broker-dealer for violating U.S. Bank Secrecy Act

item.description: Test comes for city that sold itself as metropolis of peace and stability as UAE’s ambitions threatened
